CMakeFiles/elio_tests_asan.dir/unit/test_sse.cpp.o -o elio_tests_asan  ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a ../_deps/nghttp2-build/lib/libnghttp2.a ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a ../_deps/fmt-build/libfmt.a -lpthread -luring /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
